mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM FOOD_CATEGORIES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CATEGORY_NAME ASC

SELECT FOOD_ID AS foodId, CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, FOOD_NAME AS foodName, CALORIES_PER_GRAM AS caloriesPerGram, IS_LIQUID AS isLiquid, ML_TO_G_RATIO AS mlToGRatio FROM FOOD_PRESETS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY FOOD_NAME ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FOOD_ID AS foodId, CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, FOOD_NAME AS foodName, CALORIES_PER_GRAM AS caloriesPerGram, IS_LIQUID AS isLiquid, ML_TO_G_RATIO AS mlToGRatio FROM FOOD_PRESETS WHERE FOOD_ID = #{foodId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT CATEGORY_NAME FROM FOOD_CATEGORIES WHERE CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT DRUG_ID AS drugId, DRUG_NAME AS drugName FROM MEDICATION_PRESETS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY DRUG_NAME ASC
SELECT DRUG_ID AS drugId, DRUG_NAME AS drugName FROM MEDICATION_PRESETS WHERE DRUG_ID = #{drugId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT EXERCISE_ID AS exerciseId, EXERCISE_NAME AS exerciseName, CALORIES_PER_MINUTE AS caloriesPerMinute FROM EXERCISE_PRESETS WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY EXERCISE_NAME ASC
SELECT EXERCISE_ID AS exerciseId, EXERCISE_NAME AS exerciseName, CALORIES_PER_MINUTE AS caloriesPerMinute FROM EXERCISE_PRESETS WHERE EXERCISE_ID = #{exerciseId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
